purpose: Empty-state illustration used inside the Notifications popover or notification inbox when the user has no notifications. Signals 'you're all caught up — nothing new here'.
whenToUse: Notifications popover from ShellBar when list is empty
Notification inbox page with no items
Filtered notification view with no matches
Fresh user account before any notifications arrive
whenNotToUse: For unread-count zero but items exist — that's not empty
For a load failure — use error state
For general empty list without notification semantics
doRules: Use a friendly, positive message ('All caught up!', 'No new notifications')
Use appropriate size for the popover or page
Keep tone light — this is a positive empty state
dontRules: Do not use apologetic or negative language
Do not add a CTA if there's no meaningful action
Do not use for error states
Do not shrink below Spot size

layoutGuidance.placement: Inside IllustratedMessage in the empty notification region
layoutGuidance.sizing: Spot 48×48 in popover · Dialog 120×120 on page

contentGuidance.contentRules: Title is positive; description is optional and brief
examples: Title: 'All caught up!' · Description: 'You have no new notifications'

responsiveBehavior.XL: Dialog or Spot depending on container

requirements: Screen reader announces the empty state
